name: real-estate-sites
description: Two static real estate sites from one Wix CSV — vinculoinmobiliario.com + zona-innmueble.com

scripts.build: npm run build:vinculo && npm run build:zona
scripts.dev:vinculo: npm run build:vinculo && npx serve dist/vinculo -p 3001
scripts.dev:zona: npm run build:zona    && npx serve dist/zona    -p 3002
